items.title: I think the combination of mobile and short video has rotted the brains of an entire gene…
items.title_zh: 我认为移动和短视频的结合已经腐烂了整个基因的大脑……
items.description: I think the combination of mobile and short video has rotted the brains of an entire generation of kids. See so many kids staring at their TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Reels, etc like zombies.
items.description_zh: 我认为移动和短视频的结合已经腐蚀了整整一代孩子的大脑。看到很多孩子像僵尸一样盯着他们的 TikTok、YouTube Shorts、Reels 等。

items.title: I love using Claude Code on Claude mobile app to fire off ideas on the go, then pick them…
items.title_zh: 我喜欢在 Claude 移动应用程序上使用 Claude Code 随时随地激发想法，然后挑选它们……
items.description: I love using Claude Code on Claude mobile app to fire off ideas on the go, then pick them up on my laptop later. We support easily teleporting sessions to your local CLI. Download link for Claude iOS and Android apps: https://t.co/KkIkUWTK…
items.description_zh: 我喜欢在 Claude 移动应用程序上使用 Claude Code 随时随地激发想法，然后在我的笔记本电脑上拿起它们。我们支持轻松地将会话传送到您的本地 CLI。 Claude iOS 和 Android 应用程序的下载链接：https://t.co/KkIkUWTK...

items.title: not an April Fools joke, we rewrote the Claude Code renderer to use a virtual viewport yo…
items.title_zh: 这不是愚人节玩笑，我们重写了克劳德代码渲染器以使用虚拟视口哟……
items.description: not an April Fools joke, we rewrote the Claude Code renderer to use a virtual viewport you can use your mouse, the prompt input stays at the bottom, and a lot more small UX wins people have been asking for it's experimental so give us your…
items.description_zh: 这不是愚人节玩笑，我们重写了克劳德代码渲染器以使用虚拟视口，您可以使用鼠标，提示输入保留在底部，并且人们一直在要求它是实验性的，所以给我们您的……
